# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for istio jwt validation weak and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-auth-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "https://auth.example.com"
    jwksUri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
    audiences:
    - "api.example.com"
    - "https://api.example.com"
    forwardOriginalToken: false
    fromHeaders:
    - name: Authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    fromParams:
    - "access_token"
    outputPayloadToHeader: "x-jwt-payload"
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-sub"
      claim: "sub"
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-email"
      claim: "email"
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-roles"
      claim: "roles"
    - header: "x-jwt-claim-scope"
      claim: "scope"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: require-jwt
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: DENY
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        notRequestPrincipals: ["*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        paths: ["/api/*"]
        notPaths: ["/api/health", "/api/public/*"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: jwt-claims-authorization
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["https://auth.example.com/*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        paths: ["/api/admin/*"]
    when:
    - key: request.auth.claims[roles]
      values: ["admin", "superuser"]
  - from:
    - source:
        requestPrincipals: ["https://auth.example.com/*"]
    to:
    - operation:
        paths: ["/api/user/*"]
    when:
    - key: request.auth.claims[scope]
      values: ["read", "write"]
  - to:
    - operation:
        paths: ["/api/health", "/api/public/*"]
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-peer-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
